title: Department Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions:
ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels Ventures Solutions!
